response.justification: The candidate's extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer and Staff Software Engineer is far above the entry-level Junior Java Developer role. While their technical skills (Java, TypeScript, Node.js, etc.) and agile methodologies align well, their seniority and likely salary expectations are mismatched. Additionally, their German language proficiency is only 'Basic,' which does not meet the required 'Strong' proficiency for the role.
strengths: Strong technical background in Java and object-oriented programming
Proven experience with agile development methodologies (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Diverse project experience across multiple domains and technologies
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level position (Senior Software Developer experience)
German language proficiency is only 'Basic' instead of 'Strong' as required
Likely misaligned compensation expectations for a junior role
